office_does: County commissioners adopt budgets and policy, oversee departments and infrastructure, and administer land-use, health, safety, and human services.
race_blurb: Incumbent Richard Dahl, a retired banking executive, faces STEM teacher Chelsea Chandler; the approved sources provide little detailed policy evidence for either candidate.

candidates.summary: Chandler is a middle-school STEM teacher challenging for the District 3 commission seat; detailed policy positions remain an evidence gap.
highlights: Works as a STEM teacher at Monticello Middle School [S1][S2]

experience.basis: The dossier identifies a teaching career and no prior elected or county-administration tenure, making her the clear renewal candidate in this race.

candidates.summary: Dahl is the incumbent District 3 commissioner and a retired banking executive with 39 years of management experience.
highlights: Official county records verify his current commission service [S2]
His banking career included senior management over branches, lending, and a call center [S1][S2]

experience.basis: He combines verified incumbency with a 39-year banking-management career.
